subcodes.first_line: The Day is come and the Cause hath appeared, and that which was hidden from eyes hath been made manifest. O ye [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الیوم و اتی الامر و ظهر ما کان مستورا عن الا-- یا ایها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @apocalyptic imagery, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
